column.value: Widest reach including remote/NE areas, slower delivery

column.name: body
column.value: Amazing display quality and battery life. Highly recommended.

column.name: body
column.value: Great phone but could be cheaper. Camera is outstanding.

column.name: body
column.value: Works fine for daily use. The noise level could be lower.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM support_tickets WHERE id = 'ticket-001'

column.name: description
column.value: My order was supposed to arrive on Feb 9 but it arrived on Feb 10. Please investigate.

column.name: description
column.value: Tracking shows in transit but no updates for 2 days. Please check.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seller_document WHERE id = 'sdoc-001'

column.name: rejection_reason
column.value: Document older than 3 months. Please upload a recent utility bill or bank statement.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_base_article WHERE id = 'kb-001'

column.name: title
column.value: How to create your HomeBase account

column.name: body
column.value: Welcome to HomeBase! Follow these steps to get started: 1. Visit homebase.in and click Sign Up. 2. Enter your mobile number for OTP verification. 3. Fill in your name, email address, and create a password. 4. Add your delivery address. 5. Start browsing products!

column.name: body
column.value: Track your HomeBase order in 3 ways: 1. My Orders page — Go to My Account > My Orders and click on the order. 2. Tracking link via SMS/email sent when order ships. 3. Carrier website using AWB number.

column.name: body
column.value: HomeBase accepts: UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), Credit/Debit Cards (Visa, MasterCard, RuPay), Net Banking, Wallets, and Cash on Delivery up to Rs.25,000.

column.name: body
column.value: To return a product: 1. Go to My Account > My Orders. 2. Select the order and click Return. 3. Choose a reason and upload photos if damaged. 4. Select pickup or self-ship. Return window: 7 days for most items, 10 days for electronics.

column.name: title
column.value: How to update your address and profile details

column.name: body
column.value: Update your profile: Name/Email via My Account > Profile. Phone via Change Phone with OTP. Addresses via My Account > Addresses. Password via My Account > Security > Change Password.

column.name: title
column.value: Getting started as a HomeBase seller

column.name: body
column.value: Start selling in 5 steps: 1. Register at seller.homebase.in. 2. Submit GST, PAN, bank details. 3. List products with photos and pricing. 4. Ship orders within 2 business days. 5. Get paid every 7 days after commission and TCS deduction.

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM returnrequest WHERE id = 'ret-001'

column.name: reason
column.value: Product has minor scratches on screen
